entry.title: Lissy93 opened a pull request in awesome-privacy
entry.content:
Lissy93 opened Lissy93/awesome-privacy#443 · March 20, 2026 06:07
Adds Redlib under Proxy Sites #443

Type

Addition

Changes

Adds Redlib, an alternative frontend and proxy for read-only browsing of Reddit.
Thanks @ltguillaume for suggesting this aft…

2 comments

entry.title: Lissy93 pushed awesome-privacy
entry.content:
Lissy93 pushed to main in Lissy93/awesome-privacy · March 20, 2026 12:40
2 commits to main

    Removed LocalBitcoins from Crypto, as shut down

    Removes Mycroft and Kalliope, no longer active since 2023
